calendar.description: House Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill concerns criminal conduct on public lands.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>creates the Public Lands Restoration and Protection Fund (fund) to be administered by the State Historic Preservation Office;<hr><ltbullet>amends the criminal offense of defacing by graffiti on public lands, including to add conduct involving natural and archaeological features;<hr><ltbullet>amends penalty provisions for certain criminal violations of the offense of antiquities alteration, removal, injury, or destruction;<hr><ltbullet>provides that a court may order criminal restitution to be deposited into the fund for a violation of:<hr><ltbullet1>defacing by graffiti, damage, or destruction on public lands; or<hr><ltbullet1>antiquities alteration, removal, injury, or destruction, if the violation is on state lands; and <hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
